mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_chat_session (user_id, kb_id, title) VALUES (#{userId}, #{kbId}, #{title})
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_chat_session SET title = #{title}, kb_id = #{kbId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kb_chat_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_chat_message (session_id, role, content, sources) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{sources})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kb_chat_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_chat_session SET updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{sessionId}
